history.text: Duchy of Bohemia ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The Kingdom of Bohemia emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Czechoslovakia appears in Czechia's historical record.
Czech Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
